headline: Oracle (ORCL) Launches AI Native Builder For Fusion Applications
summary: Oracle (NYSE:ORCL) has introduced a next generation AI native builder experience for Fusion Applications. The launch centers on Fusion Agentic Applications, which run natively inside Oracle Fusion Cloud Applications. The new builder is designed for both business users and developers to create, deploy, and manage outcome focused agentic systems. For investors tracking Oracle, this launch sits at the intersection of cloud software and applied AI inside core enterprise workflows. Fusion...

headline: Oracle OPERA Cloud Central Implements Additional Systems to Further Loews Hotels Delivery of Exceptional Guest Experiences
